name: slap-happy
description: Slap Happy — A personalized bubble-popping game for toddlers

scripts.build: echo 'No build step needed — static HTML/JS app'
scripts.cap:init: npx cap init 'Slap Happy' com.slaphappy.app --web-dir www
scripts.prepare: mkdir -p www && cp index.html www/ && cp -r js www/js
